ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "composition" TEXT /* Composition of the product */,
  "dosage_form_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dosage form */,
  "pack_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pack */,
  "therapeutic_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the therapeutic class */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the product */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the product */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the product */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_pack_id FOREIGN KEY ("pack_id") REFERENCES packs ("pack_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_therapeutic_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("therapeutic_class_id") REFERENCES therapeutic_classes ("therapeutic_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_dosage_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("dosage_form_id") REFERENCES dosage_forms ("dosage_form_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "ingredient_name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ingredient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_ingredients" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ingredient */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the ingredient in the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dosage_forms" (
  "dosage_form_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dosage form */,
  "dosage_form_name" TEXT /* Name of the dosage form */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dosage form */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dosage_form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packs" (
  "pack_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pack size */,
  "pack_size" TEXT /* Size of the pack */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pack size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pack_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "therapeutic_classes" (
  "therapeutic_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each therapeutic class */,
  "therapeutic_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the therapeutic class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the therapeutic class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("therapeutic_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "shelf_life" TEXT /* Shelf life of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order status */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_order_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_status_id") REFERENCES order_status_types ("order_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status_types" (
  "order_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status */,
  "order_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the order status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the order status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crm" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Details of the interaction */,
  "customer_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
column_names: Quantity of the ingredient in the product
Unique identifier for each dosage form
Unique identifier for each pack size
Unique identifier for each therapeutic class
Quantity of the product in stock
ID of the customer who made the order
Unique identifier for each order status
